title: DRW MD-DRW-518: Nose Cone Assembly
text:
Drawing MD-DRW-518 Rev C — Nose Cone Assembly

## Notes

1. All dimensions in millimetres unless stated.
2. Surface finish: Ra 3.2 unless noted.
3. Parts referenced: P-1004, P-1022, P-1023.
4. Drawn by Tobias Wren, checked by Felix Herrera, approved by Dr. Rhea Voss.
